checks.detail: marketing page identifies Aura3D as agent-written browser 3D tooling
marketing page states user-owned assets and the agent/code split
marketing page includes a concrete create-aura3d scaffold path
marketing page explicitly rejects hidden generator positioning
3/3 identify Aura3D as SDK/tooling for agent-written browser 3D
3/3 can name create-aura3d or a starter template path
0/3 think Aura3D is a hidden natural-language generator runtime

method: controlled target-reader profile comprehension eval against marketing/index.html visible copy
liveHumanInterviewStatus: optional follow-up; this local release proof does not claim recruited live-human interviews

answers.whatIsAura3D: Aura3D is a TypeScript SDK and starter workflow for AI coding agents to write browser 3D apps against a small scene API.
answers.whoIsItFor: React and TypeScript developers who want an agent to scaffold and edit WebGL scenes without inventing 3D plumbing.
answers.installFirst: I would run npx create-aura3d@latest my-scene --template product-viewer.
answers.bringToProduct: I bring my own GLB assets and let the CLI produce typed asset refs.
answers.agentDoes: The agent writes source code with createAuraApp, scene helpers, typed assets, diagnostics, screenshots, and deploy checks.
answers.generatorOrSdk: It is a code and asset SDK, not a hidden prompt-to-3D generator runtime.

answers.whatIsAura3D: Aura3D gives a web developer or coding agent an SDK workflow to place my models into browser 3D scenes with lighting, cameras, effects, and tests.
answers.whoIsItFor: Developers and teams using AI coding tools, plus artists handing assets to those teams.
answers.installFirst: I would start from a template, probably product-viewer or cinematic-scene.
answers.bringToProduct: I bring the 3D models, textures, and asset files; Aura3D handles hashed typed references and render/deploy checks.
answers.agentDoes: The agent turns the brief into editable TypeScript scene code and can run route health and screenshot checks.
answers.generatorOrSdk: It is not creating models from text. It is SDK tooling around assets and code.

answers.whatIsAura3D: Aura3D is SDK infrastructure for teams that want AI coding agents to help build and ship browser-based 3D experiences.
answers.whoIsItFor: Engineering teams building product viewers, cinematic scenes, and lightweight game-style 3D demos.
answers.installFirst: I would ask the team to use create-aura3d and choose one of the starter templates.
answers.bringToProduct: The team supplies its product or scene assets; Aura3D gives the workflow for using them safely.
answers.agentDoes: The AI coding agent writes the app code, uses the documented API, and checks whether it runs and deploys.
answers.generatorOrSdk: This is an SDK and workflow, not an invisible natural-language service.
